title: anemone halleri var. villosissima
intro: Anemone halleri var. villosissima, also known as the hairy anemone, is a perennial plant belonging to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid and glycoside content. The plant is said to have health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Anemone halleri var. villosissima is typically prepared as a tincture or infusion for medicinal use, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
